app.name: WorldWise
common.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.
category.flagToName.desc: Guess the country from its flag
category.nameToFlag.desc: Pick the right flag for the country
category.capitalToName.desc: Guess the country from its capital city
category.nameToCapital.desc: Pick the capital city of the country
category.nameToLanguage.desc: Pick an official language of the country
category.nameToRegion.desc: Pick the continent the country is in
category.mixed.desc: A shuffled mix of all categories
home.noStatsYet: Play a round to see your stats here.
home.installBody: Add WorldWise to your home screen for quick, offline access.
settings.title: Settings
settings.timer.hint: Overrides the difficulty's default time per question.
setup.title: New Game
setup.difficulty.hint: Changes how close the wrong answers are and how obscure the countries can get - easy stays with well-known countries and clearly-wrong options, hard pulls in tricky, close ones.
setup.practice.desc: Untimed, unlimited lives, shows extended facts after each answer.
game.question: Question {current} of {total}
game.whichFlag: Which flag belongs to this country?
game.whichCountryCapital: Which country has this capital city?
game.whatIsLanguage: What is an official language of {country}?
game.quitConfirm: Leave this round? Your progress on this round will be lost.
results.title: Round complete
results.gameOverEarly: Out of lives — here's how you did
stats.title: My Stats
stats.reset.confirmBody: This will permanently delete your game history and statistics. This cannot be undone.
error.boundary.title: Something broke
error.boundary.body: The app hit an unexpected error. Reloading usually fixes it.
